zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.East Horndon, Essex, England: 英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Heron於1294年出生在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登時，她的父親Roger de Héron35歲，母親Elizabeth de Swinburne25歲。她於大約1306年與Sir James Tyrell在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1378年5月27日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年84歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.East Horndon, Essex, England: 英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Heron于1294年出生在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登时，她的父亲Roger de Héron35岁，母亲Elizabeth de Swinburne25岁。她于大约1306年与Sir James Tyrell在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1378年5月27日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Heron was born in 1294, in East Horndon, Essex, England, her father, Roger de Héron, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth de Swinburne, was 25. She married Sir James Tyrell about 1306, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 May 1378, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Heron est née en 1294, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Héron, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Swinburne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Tyrell environ 1306, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 mai 1378, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Heron 1294 in East Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Héron 35 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Swinburne 25. Sie hat um 1306 in Essex, England Sir James Tyrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. Mai 1378 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Heron è nata il nel 1294 nel East Horndon, Essex, England, sua padre, Roger de Héron, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Swinburne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Tyrell circa 1306, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 maggio 1378, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Heronが1294年にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Roger de Héronは35歳，母Elizabeth de Swinburneは25歳であった。約1306年にイギリスエセックスでSir James Tyrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1378年5月27日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Heron(이)가 1294년 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Héron(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Swinburne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1306년 영국 에세스에서 Sir James Tyrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1378년 5월 27일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Heron nasceu em 1294, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Héron, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Swinburne, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Tyrell aproximadamente 1306, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de maio de 1378, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Heron родилась в 1294 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Héron было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Swinburne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Tyrell около 1306 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 мая 1378 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Heron nació en 1294, en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Héron, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Swinburne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir James Tyrell aproximadamente 1306, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1378, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
